_doc: Extractor inventory for the Relatedness Atlas. Round-1 entries (extract_staging_relatedness_v0, extract_ngsrelate_pairs_v1) cover the generic TSV-capture + ngsRelate normalize path. Typed entries added 2026-05-20 cover the 5 file-backed layers from layers.registry.json — each consumes one layer via harvest_file and emits a typed payload validated against schemas/schema_out/<schema_version>.schema.json.

extractors._doc: 23-column pairwise table from ngsPedigree Stage 1. Emits {pairs, n_pairs, n_samples, edge_class_counts}. Drives Inspector / Stats panel + Network panel edge classes.
One row per individual with family_id + hub + role. Emits {roster, n_individuals, hubs, families}. Drives the Population Browser tree.
Per-chromosome PASS/WARN/FAIL conflict counts per dyad/triad. Feeds the Mendelian-check breakdown and the trio_qc map used by Inversions four-stage scoring.
Long-format (sample × inversion × karyotype) export from the Inversion Atlas. Drives Karyotypes tab, Mendelian tester, Inversions four-stage scoring.
Cohort NGSadmix Q-matrix (sample × K columns). Drives Karyotypes ancestry stripe; falls back to demo palette when absent.
